title: Manufacturing Engineer - Mapei India South Asia Partners - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Mapei India South Asia Partners - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Mapei India South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Aurangabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Mapei India South Asia Partners:
Mapei India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mapei India South Asia Partners!
